name: vw_enrolled
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_enrolled AS SELECT * FROM Enrolled_in;

name: vw_course_enrolled
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_course_enrolled AS SELECT * FROM Course JOIN vw_enrolled ON Course.CID = vw_enrolled.CID;

name: vw_department_enrolled
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_department_enrolled AS SELECT * FROM Department JOIN vw_course_enrolled ON Department.DNO = vw_course_enrolled.DNO;

name: vw_grade_enrolled
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_grade_enrolled AS SELECT vw_enrolled.StuID, vw_course_enrolled.Grade, Gradeconversion.gradepoint, vw_course_enrolled.Credits FROM vw_enrolled JOIN vw_course_enrolled ON vw_enrolled.CID = vw_course_enrolled.CID JOIN Gradeconversion ON vw_course_enrolled.Grade = Gradeconversion.lettergrade;
